publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-15 19:00:27 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Audio recordings, correspondence, legal documents, manuscripts, memorabilia, photographs.
did.abstract: Books, articles, and movies Taormino wrote and directed, along with drafts, correspondence about their creation, production books for the movies and couple plays she directed, promotional material, and reviews and media coverage. There are audio and visual recordings of her lectures and media appearances. From her undergraduate years at Wesleyan, there are papers written for classes and her senior thesis, plus ephemera from sexuality activism. Also included is Taormino's collection of ephemera, posters, booklets, zines, magazines, and books written, produced, and created by other people on the topics of sex, sex positivity, gender LGBT/queer issues, BDSM, kink, leather, polyamory and non-monogamy, erotica and erotic photography, and pornography and feminist porn.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: A sex educator and feminist pornographer, Tristan has authored and edited numerous books and anthologies, which have sold over 500,000 copies and been translated into multiple languages. Early in her career, she worked as the Executive Assistant to Jay Hill, the Executive Director of the Gay Games (1994). Her first prominent job in erotic and feminist publishing came when she served first as columnist, then as editor of the feminist sex magazine On Our Backs (1998-2002). For nine and a half years (1999-2008), she wrote a bi-weekly column in The Village Voice, which appeared alongside Dan Savage's column "Savage Love" and won two Sex-Positive Journalism Awards. She wrote an advice column for Hustler's Taboo Magazine from 1999-2014. Her articles have appeared in Penthouse, Yale Journal of Law and Feminism, and numerous other publications. She runs her own adult film production company, Smart Ass Productions, started in 2005, and she was an exclusive director for Vivid Entertainment from 2006-2012, where she created and helmed the Vivid-Ed sex education line. She has directed and produced 25 adult films which have won numerous awards, including her multi-award winning debut film based on her book, The Ultimate Guide to Anal Sex for Women (1998). She has appeared on dozens of television shows alongside Ricki Lake, Melissa Harris-Perry, Howard Stern, and others; she worked as a script consultant for Spike Lee and appeared in John Cameron Mitchell's film Shortbus. She has lectured and taught workshops extensively throughout the United States, Canada, Germany, Sweden, Spain, and Australia at colleges, universities, conferences, and community events. She has been producer and host of the radio show and podcast Sex Out Loud since 2012.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes books, articles, and movies which Taormino wrote and directed, along with drafts, correspondence about their creation, production books for the movies and plays she directed, final commercial versions, and rough cut footage, as well as promotional material, reviews, and media coverage. There are audio and visual recordings of her lectures and appearances on television and radio. From her undergraduate years at Wesleyan University, there are papers written for classes and her senior thesis, plus ephemera from sexuality activism. Also included is Taormino's collection of ephemera, conference materials, posters, booklets, zines, magazines, and books written, produced, and created by other people on the topics of sex, sex positivity, gender LGBT/queer issues, BDSM, kink, leather, polyamory and non-monogamy, erotica and erotic photography, and pornography and feminist porn. There are also materials related to her work as an LGBT consultant for Spike Lee's film She Hate Me.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Wesleyan University Years Box 1
Series II. Gay Games IV & Cultural Festival Materials Boxes 1, 18

p.ref: The Ultimate Guide to Anal Sex for Women
Pucker Up: A Hands-on Guide to Ecstatic Sex

arrangement.p: Series IV. Public Appearances & Related Materials Boxes 2, 8, 12, 19

list.head: Books by Tristan Taormino - cataloged individually in the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
list.item: Taormino, Tristan. Dressing up and fleshing out : butch/femme erotics and politics all tied up, 1993
Taormino, Tristan. New sex : dirty secrets for maximum pleasure, 2001
Taormino, Tristan. Ekstase pur : die ErfuÌˆllung Ihrer sexuellen WuÌˆnsche , 2002
Taormino, Tristan. Tout savoir sur le plaisir anal : (pour elle), 2005
Taormino, Tristan. Opening Up: A Guide to Creating and Sustaining Open Relationships, 2008
Taormino, Tristan. Sekstoys : van vibrators en dildo's tot schommels en slings, speelse en kinky slaapkameraccessoires voor een geweldig seksleven, 2010
Taormino, Tristan. Plaisir anal sur toutes les formes : un guide pour elle et lui, 2010

list.head: Sexuality Publications Collected by Tristan Taormino - cataloged individually in the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
list.item: Housewives at Play: Sugar & Spice, 2005-10, Eros Comix
Winks, Cathy. New Good Vibrations guide to sex, 1997
Girl's guide to taking over the world : writings from the girl zine revolution, 1997
You are being lied to : the disinformation guide to media distortion, historical whitewashes and cultural myths, 2001
Bomb, Irvin. Art of Irvin Bomb, 2001
Gauthier, Isabelle. Hot pants : do it yourself gynecology, herbal remedies, 2013
Spirit captured : the official photojournal of Celebration '90--Gay Games III & Cultural Festival, 1990
Bailey, Sarah E. Truth about infidelity : hypocrisy finally revealed!, 2005
Pervert : the Art Gallery, University of California, Irvine, 1995
Everything you know about sex is wrong : the Disinformation guide to the extremes of human sexuality (and everything in between), 2006
Rosen, Michael A. Sexual portraits : photographs of radical sexuality, 1990
Garoutte, Claire. Matter of trust = Sache des Vertrauens, 1996
Lehermitte, Christian. Agenda 1994, 1993, Rare spiral bound book of kinky photography, Captive Liberation

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 2 Folder 25 restricted until 2055.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: For a period of fifty years after the assumed creation of any document, people using the collection may not publish the last name or address of any private individual mentioned therein, unless they receive permission from that individual. Researchers are asked to sign a form agreeing to abide by this rule for using the collection.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Tristan Taormino Papers, #7819. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Play Taormino wrote and directed in high school, based on a story by Gabrielle Maloney

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence regarding LGBT studies course proposal, scholarship award letters, photo of Wesleyan campus, Phi Beta Kappa materials, course syllabi, applications, general correspondence, GLAAD internship materials, Report of A.S.A.P. : The Assessment of Sexual Abuse Policies Task Force, Wesleyan University commencement program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes article clippings and book excerpts

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Flyer for a party at her special interest campus housing, Womanist House

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Paper topics include Comedy and Christianity Center Around a Courtesan: a comparison of The Eunuch and Paphntius; Allegory in Early European Drama: a matter of life and death - A comparison of English morality plays and Spanish autos sacrametales with Everyman and La Vida es Sueňo as Representative work; Consumerism and Its Link to Happiness: a comparison between Paul's Case and Sister Carrie; Crossing the Color Line or Straddling It?: a comparison of Leaves from the Mental Portfolio of a Eurasian and The Autobiography of an Ex-Colored Man

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes papers on Madonna and the Making of a Lesbian, Joe Turner's Come and Gone, and The Singular Life of Albert Nobbs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Video supplement to her college paper on "Madonna: Lesbian Icon"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Binder for play directed by Taormino. Sections include production book; design book; and budget/miscellaneous; as well as show assignments, folder of publicity materials, schedules

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Recording of the play "Attractions" she directed in college

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes 5th annual Lesbian and Gay Studies Conference packet, BDSM in NYC handouts, first edition of the Purple Circuit Newsletter, newspaper and magazine clippings, Buttons and Bumper Stickers order form, 9th annual Los Angeles International Gay and Lesbian Film and Video Festival calendar, Astraea National Lesbian Action Foundation Bulletin

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes notes on thesis and invitation to Class of 1993 commencement ceremony

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Paper topics include Queer Nerd Fantasies: Theory, Politics, and Making a Difference in the Academy; A Parody of the Straight Mind: The Subversion of Hegemonic Discourse of Gender and Sexuality in Kiss of the Spiderwoman; The Possession and Obsession of the Phallic Source: Gender, Hetero/Sexuality, and Alternative Sources of Pleasure in D.H. Lawrence's Women in Love; Lesbians and Political Identity: Issues of Separatism in the Gay and Lesbian Community; Tie Me Up and Set My Body Free or Macho Sluts Coming to Power: Audre Lorde's "Uses of the Erotic" and Lesbian Sadomasochism; Women's Studies final exam; Renegotiating Parenthood: Inventing the Male Mother in the Baby M Case

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Posters put up during orientation, not by the official LGBT group, created controversy because of sexually explicit language

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Taormino helped design this course, one of the first LGBT Studies courses, and served as a Teaching Assistant; includes course syllabus, photocopied readings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence with schools and application materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: First publication of journal; Tristan Taormino listed as contributor; 2 copies

did.unittitle: Dressing Up and Fleshing Out: Butch/Femme Erotics and Politics All Tied Up

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Thesis submitted by Taormino under advisor Claire Potter

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials related to a New City play Taormino worked as a production intern on

did.unittitle: Series II. Gay Games IV & Cultural Festival Materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photocopied articles, correspondence, promotional materials, athlete registration book and materials, other games and festival materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photocopied articles, correspondence, promotional materials, copies of message from the White House, advertising packets

did.unittitle: Gay Games IV & Cultural Festival binder materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Taormino worked as Executive Assistant to Jay Hill, the Executive Director of the Gay Games. Formerly housed in binder. Sections include Itinerary; Cultural Festival; Donors; Hotel; Opening/Closing, PR, Security; Other Events; Receptions; Sports; Staff

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes programs for Gay Games IV & Cultural Festival, Stonewall 25, and Outrageous Comedy '94

did.unittitle: Village Voice article on the Gay Games
Gay Games IV & Cultural Festival buttons & pins

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Arranged in chronological order. Boxes 3 & 4 include list of article titles both present in and absent from collection.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Outlook Weekly in Ohio picked up Taormino's Pucker Up column from the Village Voice column and syndicated it. Arranged in chronological order.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Other syndicated appearances of her Village Voice column, and freelance articles Tristan Taormino wrote. Grouped by publication outlet where possible and placed in chronological order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Masquerade Erotic Newsletter, Venus Infers, Blue Blood, Purr

scopecontent.p: Includes On Our Backs, Live Girls, Icon, Plazm, and The Advocate

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Box 11 includes list of publications and titles of reviews up to May 30, 2011. Arranged by subject and then by date.

did.unittitle: Invitation to world premiere of She Hate Me

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Dark Odyssey is an event that happens twice a year and brings tantra & spiritual sex folk, kink, swingers, and polyamory people together for educational events, social time, and programs. Tristan Taormino is a co-founder and co-producer. The event still goes on., although she stopped organizing it after 2010. Files include the programs, etiquette list, correspondence and planning documents. Arranged in chronological order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes orientation material

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes directions to event locations, pamphlets, draft partnership agreement between Tristan and co-founder
